name: Reginald Tan
lede: Nine years of code, two years of markets. Built a globally used tool inside J.P. Morgan, kept servers alive at Alibaba Cloud, shipped biometrics with AIDC. Currently leading a media & design team at SAF Guards HQ and automating a trading workflow after hours.
status: NS @ SAF Guards HQ — Team Manager (Media & Design) · AI Task Force
goal: The goal: build the systems that move money. Financial technology, done properly.
aboutHtml: I shipped my first real product, Sorts, an iOS app for educators, at fourteen. Since then: an O-Level Computing specialisation at SST, a Diploma in IT at Ngee Ann Polytechnic on the Ngee Ann Scholarship (Director's List, twice), and a year inside J.P. Morgan building a workload-monitoring tool now used globally, with a stint running server operations at Alibaba Cloud's Singapore data centres along the way.
Alongside the engineering runs a second obsession: financial markets. Two years of live trading, and now the tooling to match, from a Trading Command Sheet to a Claude-powered automated workflow.

finance.name: Reginald Tan · Software Engineering × Financial Markets
finance.ticket: Open a position in $RTAN. No lock-up period. Responds within one trading day.
finance.disclaimer: DISCLAIMER: $RTAN is not a listed security. All charts represent skill and project progression, not financial performance. Past growth is, in this one case, indicative of future results. © Reginald Tan.

readmeBadges: now: Guards HQ, media team manager · AI task force
tech.readmeAboutHtml: Builder since sorts-ios (2019, shipped at 14). Diploma in IT @ NP on the Ngee Ann Scholarship, Director's List ×2. Interned at J.P. Morgan on the Athena platform and built a workload-monitoring tool now used globally; ran server ops at Alibaba Cloud's SG data centres. Two years in the markets, now automating the workflow with Claude and MCP.
